# Pic to Cart

> Pic to Cart is an India-first e-commerce platform that lets small merchants launch a fully-featured online store in 5 minutes by just snapping product photos. AI generates titles, descriptions, prices, SEO, and a themed storefront — with COD, UPI, Razorpay, Shiprocket, GST invoices, and multilingual support built in.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, pricing tiers, top FAQs, and links to start a free store.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): 5-step merchant journey from sign-up to first sale, plus the full FAQ covering pricing, payments, GST, shipping, languages, and migration.
- [Theme Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse 50+ AI-generated store themes by category; preview live before applying.
- [Investors](/investors): Investor and partnership information for Pic to Cart.

## Optional

- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create a free merchant account or sign in.
